name: iCloud Notes
description: Exports your Apple Notes (content, titles, metadata) and folder structure via iCloud using Playwright browser automation. NOTE: The current script depends on CG-runtime-only page methods (getInput, frame_click/fill/evaluate/waitForSelector, keyboard_press/type) and does not yet run under the canonical DataConnect playwright-runner. Runtime convergence is a Phase 4+ follow-up; the capability flag `cg-legacy-page-api` advertises this limitation so runners can reject the connector up front.

scopes.label: Your notes
scopes.description: Note content, titles, created/modified timestamps, and folder assignment
